noTeams.title: No teams yet
noTeams.description: Create a team to share bookmarks and collaborate with others.

noBookmarks.title: No shared bookmarks
noBookmarks.description: Save articles to this team to share with all members.

noMembers.title: Invite your team
noMembers.description: Send email invites to add members to this team.

validation.nameTooShort: Team name must be at least 3 characters
validation.nameTooLong: Team name must be 50 characters or less
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

leaveTeam.title: Leave Team
leaveTeam.message: You will lose access to shared bookmarks. This cannot be undone.

removeMember.title: Remove Member
removeMember.message: This will remove {{name}} from the team. They will lose access to shared bookmarks.

deleteTeam.title: Delete Team
deleteTeam.message: All team data including bookmarks will be deleted after 7 days. This cannot be undone.

removeBookmark.title: Remove Bookmark
removeBookmark.message: Remove this article from team bookmarks?

errors.inviteFailed: Could not send invite. Please try again.
errors.teamLimit: You've reached the maximum of 10 teams.
errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.alreadyMember: This user is already a team member.
errors.invitePending: An invite has already been sent to this email.
errors.invalidInvite: This invite is invalid or has expired.
errors.ownerCannotLeave: Owner cannot leave. Transfer ownership first.
